task_description: Complete overhaul of Products page - fix mismatched images, reorder categories with Rice first, redesign cards for premium export company look, fix responsive grid, add trust signals for international buyers

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. All 9 routes generate as static content including /products. Products page completely rewritten with correct Unsplash images, categories reordered (Rice first), premium card design with trust badges, Framer Motion animations, responsive grid (1/2/3 cols). Review issues addressed: scrollbar-hide CSS added, Basmati sourcing badge corrected to Punjab & Haryana, Non-Basmati image replaced with clear rice grain photo, Global Export badge hidden on mobile. 3 commits on main branch.
